title: Iran-Israel War Live Updates: Israeli Helicopter Shot Down In Lebanon, Claims Hezbollah
description: Israel Iran War News Live Updates: The West Asia conflict expanded to include Iran-backed militias on Monday with an attack by Hezbollah on Israel. Israel struck back against the group in Lebanon while the United States pounded targets in Iran.Iran-Israel News Live Updates:Hezbollah Claims Strike on Israeli Helicopter: Hezbollah said it struck an Israeli helicopter flying over an eastern mountain range in Lebanon. There was no immediate confirmation or comment from Israel or its military regarding the reported attack.Trump on Oil Prices: US President Donald Trump said short-term increases in oil prices are a “small price to pay” for global safety and stability during the ongoing conflict involving Iran.Iran Armed Forces Back Mojtaba Khamenei: Iranian Armed Forces and the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps declared allegiance to Mojtaba Khamenei as Iran’s new supreme leader. In a statement carried by state media, the military described him as “just, knowledgeable, pious and resourceful” and praised the Assembly of Experts for selecting him.Mojtaba Khamenei Named As Iran’s Supreme Leader: A report said Mojtaba Khamenei is set to succeed his late father Ali Khamenei as Iran’s supreme leader.Israeli military operations: The Israeli army says it hit over 400 targets in Iran today, including ballistic missile launchers and UAV storage facilities.US President's statement: US President Donald Trump said that any deal with Iran must result in the country’s “unconditional surrender”. White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt said the US is on track to control Iranian airspace, with objectives expected to be completed in four to six weeks.US suspends embassy operations In Kuwait: The US has suspended all operations at its embassy in Kuwait City due to escalating regional security threats.Ukraine to help counter Shahed drones: President Volodymyr Zelenskyy said Ukraine will deploy specialists and resources after a US request for assistance against Shahed drones in the Middle East.Iran claims drone strike on US carrier: Iranian state media reported the IRGC Navy hit the USS Abraham Lincoln with drones, forcing the carrier group to retreat over 1,000 km; the US has not responded.Trump rejects Khamenei’s son: Donald Trump said he must be involved in selecting Iran’s next leader and dismissed Mojtaba Khamenei as “unacceptable.”Iran accuses US Navy of ‘atrocity’: Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi condemned the U.S. for sinking the Iranian frigate IRIS Dena, warning Washington would “bitterly regret” the move.War escalates across region: Iran launched new attacks on Israel, US bases and regional targets as Israeli and US strikes on Iran entered a sixth day.Sri Lanka rescues Iranian sailors: Sri Lanka evacuated 208 crew members from an Iranian navy vessel a day after a USsubmarine sank another Iranian frigate near its waters.Iran's capabilities destroyed, claims Trump: "Their army is gone. Their Navy is gone. Their communications are gone. Their leaders are gone. Two sets of their leaders are gone," claimed Trump. Supply concerns have driven crude and gasoline higher as the war ensnares major oil-producing countries and hinders exports from the Persian Gulf.
